instruction: The play icon is missing a red horizontal strikethrough. Add one back across the center (line (16,64)→(112,64), stroke #e63946, stroke-width 2).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/play.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/play.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.972l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.667-.986V5.653Z"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
